expectations.text: Output performs web research on Gymshark (scrapes site or uses search) to ground the brief in real info
expectations.evidence: WebFetch used on gymshark.com. Brief contains specific tech stack details (Next.js, Contentful, Shopify, Dynamic Yield, mParticle) and specifics about their product catalog and international reach.

expectations.text: Brief includes specific details about Gymshark identifying them as a large, enterprise-scale brand
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states: 25+ international markets, multi-currency, physical retail locations, hundreds of SKUs, mature loyalty infrastructure, sophisticated tech stack. Description is grounded in real company data.

expectations.text: Output explicitly flags the size mismatch as a watch-out — Gymshark is not a typical small-agency prospect
expectations.evidence: Watch-outs section leads with: 'Size mismatch: Gymshark is an enterprise brand with a full internal engineering team... Make sure the conversation is about a specific project, not ongoing work.'

expectations.text: Output includes a NexusPoint Positioning section with a specific angle for this prospect
expectations.evidence: NexusPoint Positioning section with Best angle: 'We move fast on scoped, specific builds — campaign pages, performance fixes, and AI-powered features you want to ship without tying up your internal team.'
